{{Infobox character
| name = Sword Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Sword Sage, Enforcer
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Sword Sage Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Sword]] [[Sage]], also known as the [[Sage of the Endless Sword]], was a powerful [[Archlord]] and master of the [[Endless Sword]] [[Path]]. A traveler from beyond the [[Sacred Valley]], he was a highly skilled refiner and combatant who possessed rare ingredients and legendary weapons. He was known for his mastery of the [[Endless Sword]] technique, a fighting style that allowed him to deflect multiple attacks simultaneously and even strike without a physical blade. His combat prowess was such that he could potentially cut through mountains or cleave [[Dreadgods]] using his specialized authority. As a teacher, the [[Sage]] was described as cryptic and demanding, often using riddles rather than direct instruction and pushing his students through rigorous physical training. He hand-selected [[Yerin Arelius]] as his disciple, providing her with a specialized [[sword]] and passing on fragments of his memories to aid her advancement. Despite his immense strength, the [[Sage]] was eventually killed after venturing into a dangerous boundary field or maze to uncover secrets belonging to [[Monarchs]]. He left behind a private [[void]] space containing various treasures and a sword codex filled with the collective wisdom of thousands of sword artists.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Originally hailing from beyond [[Sacred Valley]], [[the Sword]] [[Sage]] served as an [[Enforcer]] and was known to always carry rare sacred herbs. After his death, he was interred in the [[Ancestor's Tomb]], where his remnant was sealed within the [[Grand Patriarch’s tomb]]. This remnant is composed entirely of [[sword]]-aspect [[madra]], possesses six blades on its back, and utilizes his original [[sword]]. Despite being a remnant, it retains the ability to think strategically and understand script. [[The Sword]] [[Sage]] left a [[gold badge]] for his disciple, [[Yerin]], while [[Lindon]] seeks to find his physical body.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] was sealed in the [[Grand Patriarch’s tomb]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]] came from beyond [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]] was an [[Enforcer]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] is made up entirely of [[sword]]-aspect [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] is capable of understanding script and thinking strategically.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]] always carried rare sacred herbs on his person.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] uses his [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] is the disciple of the [[Sword Sage]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]] has a body that [[Lindon]] wants to find.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] has six blades on its back.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]] left a [[gold badge]] for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Sword Sage]] was interred in the [[Ancestor's Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sword Sage]] is [[Yerin's master]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Sword]] [[Sage]] was a powerful figure who possessed a spiritual sense and left behind a [[Remnant]] capable of performing unimaginable feats. After plucking [[Yerin]] from the ashes of her childhood home, the [[Sage]] took her on as an apprentice. During her training, the [[Sage]] taught [[Yerin]] to act without regret and to show no mercy toward enemies. The [[Sage]]'s immense power allowed for feats such as cutting a mountain in half without the use of a [[sword]], and their complex knot was something [[Yerin]]'s guest chose not to strain against.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] can perform unimaginable feats.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Sword Sage]]'s knot is described as something [[Yerin]]'s guest was content not to strain against.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Sword Sage]] plucked [[Yerin]] from the ashes of her childhood home.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Sword Sage]] can cut a mountain in half without a [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Sword Sage]] taught [[Yerin]] not to show mercy to enemies and to act without regret.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Sword Sage]] has a spiritual sense.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Sword Sage]] has an apprentice.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Sword Sage]] left behind a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] has uncovered four of the [[Sword Sage]]'s memories since achieving [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Sword Sage]] taught that the pursuit of perfection in the [[sacred arts]] is a lonely pursuit.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Sword Sage]] has six [[sword]]-arms on his back.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] asked if the [[Sword Sage]] gave her something better.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sword Sage]] is a wiry man with messy hair and half-lidded eyes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sword Sage]] wields a white [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sword Sage]]'s power level was higher than an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Final Sword]] is an adaptation of the [[Sword Sage]]'s strike.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Sage]] is a title or rank that [[Yerin]] could potentially achieve.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sages]] do not take apprentices.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Quickriver]] clashed with the [[Sword Sage]]’s nameless blade.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Sword Sage]] is dead.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The room [[Lindon]] entered was the [[Sword Sage]]’s private storage space.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22">''Bloodline'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sword Sage]] had a private [[void]] space.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sword Sage]] is a person who prefers to work alone rather than with a team.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sword Sage]] made it out of the [[labyrinth]] but was weakened by [[Jades]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Attacks of a certain level would not trouble the [[Sword Sage]] even with a suppression field.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sword Sage]] is the source of the echo [[Lindon]] brought for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sword Sage]] is a source of information mentioned by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|"I, Wei Shi Lindon, hereby swear on my soul that I will do my best to help Yerin, the disciple of the Sword Sage, escape from the pursuit of the Heaven’s Glory School."<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“Did the Sword Sage give you something better?”<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“And yet you held the Sword Sage’s private void space open for years.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
